---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Cataclysme et catastrophe

Nous allons charger les données concernant les cataclysme et catastrophe subits par les ménages.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library (gt) # Easily create presentation - ready display tables

# Loading observatories data
res_deb <- read_dta("data/res_deb.dta")
# Loading household data
res_m_a <- read_dta("data/res_m_a.dta")
```

```{r}
# Loading disaster data
res_cc <- read_dta("data/res_cc.dta") # year, j5
res_cca <- read_dta("data/res_cca.dta") # year, j5
```
